PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-24-2018 Continued To Nov-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-23-2018 Continued To Sep-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt for Christy Cherbas.

Mr. Huysentruyt questions what's the difference between opening a probate as opposed to an 850 petition, stated that the Estate proceeding will be open for four months, that he can then file a petition to terminate, that he is dealing with an out of State bank and that they are requiring letters of administration. Mr. Huysentruyt also stated that Christina has no surviving issue, that $1,200,000.00 does not belong to the probate proceeding and that it belongs to the Trust for a property that was sold. In addition, Mr. Huysentruyt stated that it might be easier to do an 850 petition and that if does file one, he will terminate this estate proceeding. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to September 24, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
